step.name: pre-plan
step.action: Confirm 3-4 humans available, name facilitator, set rotation interval.

step.name: kick-off
step.action: 5-min framing: state goal, ground rules, agent role.

step.name: rotate
step.action: Driver writes; navigator dictates; every 5-15 min rotate; agent passive unless asked.

step.name: decision-capture
step.action: Facilitator notes each decision with rationale; agent transcribes if scoped.
step.decision-gate: If no decisions after 30 min, pause and re-scope or end the mob.
